content.en:
"So much gold water from the other side, enough for me to use for a long time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, he used the golden water on the other side to quench his immeasurable bones, and completed four bone transformations one by one.

And he occasionally buys some resources, which are not for himself, but for the Terrans in the seas.

He was ready to build the Terran Race into the most powerful top overlord-level force in the territorial sea realm, cultivating a large number of bone transformation realms.

And the nine blood transformation realms have impacted the bone transformation realm, which has always been the most difficult problem in the territorial sea boundary and many blood transformation realms.

However, Ye Tian found a resource in the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

This kind of resource can quickly help a person break through to the Bone Transformation Realm of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

Of course, this kind of resource is only of great help to the ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realm, very little to the Boundary Breaking Genius, and even more useless to the Primeval Genius.

Because of this, there are many ordinary bone transformation realms in the land of the Eternal Shore, and there are very few boundary-breaking geniuses, and primeval-level geniuses are even rarer.

After all, the ordinary Blood Transformation Realm can easily break through the Bone Transformation Realm, and if you become an ancient genius, it will be a hundred times or even a thousand times more difficult to become a Bone Transformation Realm!

And this resource is called the Eternal Source Flower!

The Eternal Source Flower is not too expensive, after all, it is only of great value to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and it is useless to the Bone Transformation Realm.

Therefore, in the Eternal Ancient Demon City, an Eternal Source Flower is only worth 1,000 primary Eternal Ancient Gold.

And to help an ordinary Nine-Time Blood Transformation Realm break through to the Bone Transformation Realm, one Eternal Source Flower is enough.

In other words, 1,000 Primary Eternal Ancient Gold could help an ordinary Ninth Blood Transformation Realm become a Bone Transformation Realm.

Thereupon.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to collect resources and materials on the other side of the Eternal Shore and sold them, exchanged them for primary eternal ancient gold, and then went to buy the Eternal Source Flower.

As for the Canghe Pearl and the golden water on the other side, it is impossible for him to sell them.

The years passed.

Ye Tian exchanged more and more Eternal Source Flowers, as well as various resources that helped the human race improve their bloodline foundation and greatly improve their cultivation, and they were also accumulating more and more.

Before you know it, several primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian had already completed five bone transformations of one hundred and sixty immeasurable bones, but his golden water on the other side had all been exhausted, and he had to find a way to continue looking for the golden water on the other side or other treasures in order to quickly refine his immeasurable bones.

"First of all, send the Eternal Source Flowers and various resources collected by these primeval eras back to the territorial sea boundary rift!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course.

He also had to prepare to buy a treasure, the Eternal Shuttle!

The treasure of the Eternal Realm Shuttle is a treasure used to break through the barriers of various worlds, and it is very convenient to use.

For example, in the land of eternity, there are some worlds whose personality is not lower than the boundary of the territorial waters, and even if the bone transformation realm wants to enter these worlds, it is very difficult.

But if you use the Eternal Shuttle, you can easily get in.

And the Eternal Realm is not expensive, you can buy one piece of 100,000 Eternal Ancient Gold.

So, Ye Tian bought one.

After buying the Eternal Shuttle, Ye Tian refined it, and then returned to the territorial sea boundary rift with the Eternal Shuttle.

......

"The boundary of territorial waters has been sewn!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He urged the Eternal Shuttle and swiped lightly across the barrier of the boundary gap in the territorial waters.

Hiss!

The barrier between the boundary of the territorial sea was easily cut.

"What a terrific Eternal Shuttle. If it were me, I wouldn't be able to break through the barrier of the territorial sea boundary, and I would have to use the power of a group of bone transformation realms and formations to have any hope of breaking through. As a result, with the use of the Eternal Realm Shuttle, it can be done with a single stroke!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

If it weren't for the Eternal Realm Shuttle, he would still have to pass through the passage of the Chaos Sea every time, how troublesome it would be!

After breaking through the barrier of the territorial sea boundary seam, Ye Tian directly entered the territorial sea boundary crack and was not blocked.

After all, he himself is a member of the territorial sea boundary seam, so naturally he will not be rejected by the territorial sea boundary seam.

Somewhere in the boundary of the territorial waters.

Ye Tian appeared here, then identified the direction and returned directly to the Wanlong territorial waters.

After coming back.

Ye Tian called his son Ye Xingchen over.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen said respectfully.

"These resources are for you!"

Ye Tian took out the Ancient Hunyuan Liquid that he didn't need and the resources he purchased in the Eternal Ancient Demon City that would help Ye Xingchen's cultivation.

Ye Xingchen took it, looked at these resources, and was immediately excited.

"Thank you, father!" Ye Xingchen hurriedly said.

"Take it and cultivate, and strive to become an ancient-level genius of the Three Bone Transformation Realm as soon as possible!" Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen nodded.

In the days that followed.

Ye Tian gave those resources and the Eternal Source Flower to some geniuses of the human race through rewards, but it was not easy to obtain these resources, and he had to make a meritorious contribution or make a great contribution to the human race before he was eligible to obtain them.

Gradually, however, these resources were spent.

this day.

The Terrans have finally given birth to the Third Bone Transformation Realm.

Soon after, the fourth bone metamorphosis, the fifth bone metamorphosis, and the sixth bone metamorphosis were born.

Like Ye Tian's wife and daughter, they were all ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realms, and using these resources were naturally easy to become Bone Transformation Realms.

As the number of bone transformation realms increased, and these Terran bone transformation realms were also breaking through the territorial sea boundary, this news naturally couldn't be hidden.

......

True Dragon Cave Heaven.

The Lord of the True Dragon had just healed his wounds, and when he heard that the Terran Race had successively given birth to the Bone Transformation Realm, he was immediately shocked.

"How is it possible, how could the human race give birth to so many bone transformation realms?"

He didn't understand.

"Isn't it ......"

He had a guess in his heart, that is, Ye Tian had brought a lot of good things from the land of eternity, which made the strength of the human race skyrocket, and so many bone transformation realms were born, otherwise there was no way to explain it.

But.

Ye Tian clearly didn't come back from the passage in the Chaoxu Sea!

Ye Tian entered the land of eternity after him, and since then, there has been a bone transformation realm guarding, and he has never seen Ye Tian come back, this is a certain thing.

Even if it is not Ye Tian's real body, it is just a clone, but it has to come back before he can bring the resources back.

"Maybe the Endless Lord has come back in some other way!"

The Lord of the True Dragon guessed.

Abrupt.

His heart was full of jealousy and unwillingness.

"Why should I return with a serious injury, but the Lord of Endless can get a great benefit, and let the human race give birth to so many bone transformation realms, this is not fair!!"

The more the Lord of the True Dragon thought about it, the more angry he became.

He is going to unite several powerful bone transformation realms to go to the Endless Lord to ask for some resources and information, even if the human race now has a lot of bone transformation realms, but they are all ordinary bone transformation realms, there is no threat.
